title: Implement GameBase to ES-DE media linker
description: Create link_gamebase_media.py script to map screenshots and covers to ES-DE structure using hard links, and verify it on Atari 2600

title: Support multiple GameBase platforms
description: Update the converter script to accept custom output directories, run conversions against multiple platform MDB databases on the E: drive, and output the generated XML files to local subfolders under Games/.

title: Add option to flatten ES-DE lists
description: Implement the creation/deletion of Games/flatten.txt based on an interactive terminal prompt or CLI flags to hide subfolders in ES-DE.

title: Implement GameBase-to-ESDE metadata converter
description: Create a standalone, dependency-free PowerShell script to export Commodore 64 GameBase MDB metadata, screenshots, and cover art into ES-DE gamelist.xml format using parent-relative paths.
